CREATE TABLE users (user_id INT, created_at TIMESTAMP);
SELECT u.user_id, millisecond(u.created_at) AS created_millisecond FROM users u WHERE millisecond(u.created_at) > 300;
CREATE TABLE logs (log_id INT, log_time TIMESTAMP);
SELECT l.log_id, millisecond(l.log_time) AS log_millisecond FROM logs l JOIN users u ON l.log_time > u.created_at;
SELECT SUM(millisecond(event_time)) AS total_milliseconds FROM events WHERE event_time < timestamp '2021-08-03 12:00:00';
SELECT DISTINCT millisecond(created_at) FROM users WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM users WHERE created_at > timestamp '2021-08-03 11:59:44');
CREATE TABLE transactions (transaction_id INT, transaction_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO transactions VALUES (1, timestamp '2021-08-03 11:59:44.999999'), (2, timestamp '2021-08-03 11:59:44.000001');
SELECT t.transaction_id, millisecond(t.transaction_time) AS transaction_millisecond FROM transactions t WHERE millisecond(t.transaction_time) BETWEEN 1 AND 500;
